views.label: ML/Data
profile: Software engineer in Barcelona finishing Computer Engineering at UOC, focused on ML/data systems.
I bring a previous banking and insurance operations background, which helps me care about reliability, traceability, and domain rules.

technicalBase.value: Python learning path, SQL, data pipelines, ML specialization, technical reporting, Git/GitHub, and regulated-domain process context.
Markdown, static web files, LaTeX, SQLite, and GitHub Actions used to keep work reproducible and easy to review.
Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, Maven, SQL, Git, Linux, authentication context, and microservice-oriented capstone work.

views.label: Agentic

header.label: CV / AGENTIC
header.title: Agentic workflow CV
header.subtitle: Workflow engineering, developer tooling, documentation, and review gates.

profile: Software engineer building small tools, static pages, reports, and review habits around my own work.
I use agents, but I keep the final shape under human judgment: source files, state, validation, and review before publication.

technicalBase.value: Path-based agent roles, state files, sprint contracts, PairCheck review gates, and public status exports.
Static site, JSON content model, GitHub Pages, reports, CV artifacts, and reproducible source links.
Small scoped changes, validation scripts, traceable source material, local-first storage choices, and human-readable project dashboards.
